sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Melampus</hi> Scriptor de divinatione [Melamp.] <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ ἐλαιῶν τοῦ σώματος μαντικὴ πρὸς Πτολεμαῖον,</foreign> ed. J. G. F. Franz, <title_ TEIform="title">Scriptores Physiognomiae Veteres,</title_> Altenburg 1780. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ παλμῶν,</foreign> ed. H. Diels, <title_ TEIform="title">Abh. Berl.Akad.,</title_> 1907; cf. <title_ TEIform="title">PRyl.</title_> 1.28.</item>
